title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation · Risk Brief: Mutation Testing
summary: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates mutation testing increment in a risk-to-test coverage matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use mutation analysis selectively to find assertions that do not detect behavior changes.
Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Mutation Testing evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-mutation-testing-15bt7p: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Mutation Testing into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-mutation-testing-15bt7p:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Mutation Testing structural check is only one gate. a risk-to-test coverage matrix must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
